title: In vitro GTPase activity
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"e5od5","text":"This protocol details methods for the in vitro GTPase activity testing of purified LRRK2.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":38,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"dpgsb","text":" ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"1cfod","text":"   ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":1,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"7j5t3","text":"Microplate reader (Synergy H1; BioTek)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"id":251136,"guid":"4218BCAA341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"EnzChek\u0026trade; Phosphate Assay Kit","mol_weight":0,"sku":"E6646","url":"https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/E6646","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":440,"name":"Thermo Fisher","link":"https://www.thermofisher.com","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/440.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/440.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}},"1":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"id":956952,"guid":"4373B643341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"96-well Clear Flat Bottom Polystyrene TC-treated Microplate Individually Wrapped with Low Evaporat","mol_weight":0,"sku":"3595","url":"https://ecatalog.corning.com/life-sciences/b2c/US/en/Microplates/Assay-Microplates/96-Well-Microplates/Corning%C2%AE-96-well-Clear-Polystyrene-Microplates/p/3595","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":40,"name":"Corning","link":"https://www.corning.com/worldwide/en.html","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Set up the reaction mixtures in a 96-well plate with 5 µL 20× reaction buffer ( 1 Molarity (M) Tris-HCl, 20 millimolar (mM) MgCl2, pH 7.5 and 2 millimolar (mM) sodium azide), 200 micromolar (µM) 2-amino-6-mercapto-7-methylpurine riboside, 0.1 U purine nucleoside phosphorylase, and 9 micromolar (µM) LRRK2 protein or 0.8 micromolar (µM) Dynamin1 or buffers for the control in separate wells. Note: For best measurement results, we usually use a total volume of 80 µL - 100 µL .
Preincubate samples in the microplate reader for 00:30:00 at 37 °C .
Add 0.5 millimolar (mM) GTP (final concentration) to initiate the reaction.
Immediately begin reading absorbance at 360 nm , every 00:01:00 over 00:45:00 at 37 °C .
For data analysis, subtract the last values determined before GTP was added from the corresponding values for the experimental reaction.
creator: xinbo.wang
